sync.enableDesc: Automatically sync transactions in the background
sync.hourDesc: Hour of the day to trigger background sync (0-23)
sync.daysBackDesc: Number of days to fetch when syncing

display.billingCycleDesc: Day of month when credit card billing cycle starts

scraper.updateCategoriesDesc: If an existing transaction has a new category from the bank, update it.
scraper.retriesDesc: Number of times to retry if scraping fails (default: 3)
scraper.timeoutDesc: Maximum duration for scraping operations (default: 90 seconds)
scraper.logHttpDesc: Output all HTTP requests from the scraper to the console (useful for debugging).
scraper.isracardDesc: Fetch categories from Isracard/Amex API (slower, but provides bank categorization).

debug.screenshotsDesc: View captured screenshots from scraper sessions

ai.blurb: Configure any OpenAI-compatible provider (OpenRouter, Groq, Together, OpenAI, LMStudio, Ollama, etc.). Use one of the presets below or paste a custom base URL.
ai.presetDesc: Quickly fill the base URL for popular providers
ai.apiKeyDesc: Bearer token for the selected provider

whatsapp.scanInstruction: Scan this QR code with WhatsApp (Settings > Linked Devices)
whatsapp.generateQrHelp: Click to start WhatsApp connection and generate QR code
whatsapp.generatingQrHelp: Please wait, this may take a few seconds
whatsapp.renewHelp: Renew QR to link a different WhatsApp account or fix connection issues
whatsapp.enableDesc: Send a daily financial summary via WhatsApp
whatsapp.notifyRestartDesc: Send a WhatsApp message when the app restarts and the vault is waiting to be unlocked — useful for spotting unexpected reboots
whatsapp.modeDesc: Time period to cover in the summary
whatsapp.hourDesc: Hour of the day to send summary (0-23)
whatsapp.recipientsDescHint: Press Enter or tab to add a recipient
whatsapp.testHelp: This will generate a daily summary and send it to your WhatsApp now

vault.passkeySupported: Use biometric or security key to unlock your vault without a passphrase.
vault.passkeyUnsupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
vault.noPasskeys: No passkeys registered yet. Register one above to enable biometric unlock.
vault.changePassphraseDesc: Update your vault passphrase. All passkeys will be invalidated.
vault.passphraseChangedWithCleared: Passphrase changed successfully. {{count}} passkey(s) were invalidated — re-register if needed.

danger.deleteAllDesc: Permanently delete all transactions from the database. This action cannot be undone.
